subject: english
topic_title: Essay Writing: Descriptive Essay on the Evil Effect of Peer Pressure
learning_objectives: Organise description in a logical order
Write on the given topic using relevant detail

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: A descriptive essay requires the writer to describe an object, person, animal, incident, or scene vividly.

sections.heading: Guidance
sections.content: The writer should have a clear mental picture of what is to be described and present details in a logical order without jumping forwards and backwards.
